title: Spy Digger

title: CipherLock

title: eCourts Data Fetcher
description: Professional Flask web application for Indian court data management with modern glassmorphism UI
Features 3 core search functions, dynamic cascading dropdowns, and comprehensive security implementations
Security-hardened with SQL injection prevention, XSS protection, and parameterized queries
features: Case Status, Cause List, and Party Search functionality
35 Indian states/UTs with comprehensive district mappings
16+ case types covering all legal categories
Mock mode for reliable testing and demonstrations
